notes: Requires the installation of dotnet452 via Protontricks to start. This is likely because of the Kalypso Launcher, and as far as I know there's no way to bypass it, otherwise Protontricks would probably not be necessary. FPS drops in towns with a lot going on, but that's something even Windows users with decent systems report. (Forced anti-aliasing is the likely culprit.)
title: Demonicon

notes: After reading the previous report, I deleted my old prefix and tried the game with Proton's latest version, which includes a major wine-mono upgrade. I can confirm this game no longer requires Protontricks to run, and my gamepad worked fine (but you have to manually switch to it in the options menu). The game still has framerate issues in certain areas, but again, that's an issue even on Windows.
title: Demonicon
